DISCOVERY 525, PLAINTIFF JAIRO CANCHOLA AN INDIVIDUAL, ANDREA RODRIGUEZ'S MOTION FOR AN ORDER DEEMING THE TRUTH OF MATTERS SPECIFIED AS ADMITTED IN PLAINTIFFS' REQUESTS FOR ADMISSIONS (SET ONE). THE MOTION IS DENIED, WITHOUT PREJUDICE, FOR FAILURE TO FILE A SEPARATE STATEMENT. "[A]NY MOTION INVOLVING THE CONTENT OF A DISCOVERY REQUEST OR THE RESPONSES TO SUCH A REQUEST MUST BE ACCOMPANIED BY A SEPARATE STATEMENT."CAL.R.CT.3.1345(A). THE PREVAILING PARTY IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER REPEATING VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE TENTATIVE RULING APPROVED AS TO FORM AND MUST E-MAIL IT TO THE JUDGE PRO TEM AT TOM@THOMASCOHEN.COM. Motion For An Order Deeming The Truth Of Matters Specified As Admitted In Plaintiffs' Requests For Admissions (Set One)
Off Calendar Sep-19-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No Appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling.

PLAINTIFF JAIRO CANCHOLA AN INDIVIDUAL, ANDREA RODRIGUEZ's Motion For An Order Deeming The Truth Of Matters Specified As Admitted In Plaintiffs' Requests For Admissions (Set One)

The Motion is denied, without prejudice, for failure to file a separate statement. "[A]ny motion involving the content of a discovery request or the responses to such a request must be accompanied by a separate statement."Cal.R.Ct.3.1345(a).

The prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order repeating verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling approved as to form and must e-mail it to the Judge Pro Tem at tom@thomascohen.com.

Judge Pro Tem: Thomas Cohen, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (525/jpt)
